help.title: Help & Support Center
help.subtitle: Ask a question, report a problem, and track every request in one place.
help.channelHint: If your system stopped working, choose Technical. If you have a question before buying, choose Contact. If you need help with your account, choose Support.

help.routedToRightTeam: We sent your request to the right team

layout.helpText: Our team is available 24/7 to help you.

guidance.videoDescription: Watch a short walkthrough of this module.
guidance.faqDescription: Find quick answers to common questions.

welcome.title: Welcome to RentCar
welcome.description: Your rental management platform is ready. Let us configure your agency in a few simple steps.

vehicle.title: Create your first vehicle
vehicle.description: Add your first vehicle to start receiving reservations.

client.title: Create your first client
client.description: Create a client profile for reservations, contracts, and payment history.

reservation.title: Create your first reservation
reservation.description: Connect a client and an available vehicle with exact rental dates and times.

contract.title: Generate your first contract
contract.description: Generate a contract from your reservation data without duplicate entry.

gps.title: Configure GPS
gps.description: Optionally connect your GPS provider to track vehicles and trips.

complete.title: Setup complete
complete.description: Congratulations. Your agency is ready to manage rentals.

dashboard.title: Your live dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor reservations, vehicles, revenue, clients, and recommended next actions from real platform data.

vehicles.title: Manage your vehicles
vehicles.description: Add vehicles, update details, manage availability, GPS links, and maintenance status.

clients.title: Manage your clients
clients.description: Create client profiles and review their reservations, contracts, documents, and payment history.

reservations.title: Create and manage reservations
reservations.description: Reservations connect clients, vehicles, contracts, availability, and payments automatically.

contracts.title: Generate rental contracts
contracts.description: Contracts reuse client, vehicle, pricing, and reservation data and support digital signatures.

payments.title: Track every payment
payments.description: Review revenue, balances, invoices, refunds, and transaction history from the financial source of truth.

gps.title: Track connected vehicles
gps.description: Configure a provider and monitor location, speed, ignition, battery, and trip history.

settings.title: Configure your workspace
settings.description: Manage agency identity, language, currency, timezone, notifications, SMTP, and integrations.

contractTemplates.title: Build your contract templates
contractTemplates.description: Upload a scanned paper contract, map the dynamic fields, and set a default template for PDF generation.

operationsCenter.title: Track support tickets
operationsCenter.description: Create support tickets, follow their status, and add comments until they are resolved.

tour.dashboard: This is your dashboard. It summarizes the agency using live data.
tour.vehicles: The Vehicles module controls fleet availability and maintenance.
tour.reservations: Reservations connect clients, vehicles, contracts, and pricing.
tour.gps: GPS Tracking shows live vehicle and trip information.
tour.subscription: The Subscription Center shows your plan, usage, billing, and upgrades.

recommendation.title: Recommended next action
recommendation.vehicle: Add your first vehicle to begin configuring the fleet.
recommendation.client: Create your first client so you can start a reservation.
recommendation.reservation: Create your first reservation from an available vehicle and client.
recommendation.contract: Generate the contract linked to your reservation.

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
common.unableToLoadPageDesc: Something went wrong while loading this page. You can retry or return to the dashboard.

subscription.featureLockedDesc: This feature requires a higher plan tier. Upgrade to unlock it.

appearance.subtitle: Changes preview instantly; click Save to persist them.

soundSettings.subtitle: Premium, subtle audio feedback for important agency events.
soundSettings.audioUnlockNotice: Browser audio unlocks after the first click or key press. Visual notifications always remain active.
soundSettings.enableSoundsDesc: Turn all notification sounds on or off.
soundSettings.muteSystemAlertsDesc: Suppress GPS, subscription, and error sounds.
soundSettings.importantOnlyDesc: Play sound only for priority events.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.AUTH_REQUIRED: Authentication is required. Please sign in again.
errors.AGENCY_CONTEXT_MISSING: Your account is not linked to an agency. Please contact support.
errors.VEHICLE_NOT_IN_AGENCY: This vehicle does not belong to your agency.
errors.VEHICLE_NOT_AVAILABLE: This vehicle is not available right now.
errors.VEHICLE_CURRENTLY_RENTED: This vehicle cannot be updated while a rental contract is active.
errors.MAINTENANCE_NOT_FOUND: Maintenance work order was not found.
errors.MAINTENANCE_CREATE_FAILED: Unable to create maintenance work order. Please try again.
errors.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_UPDATE_FAILED: Unable to update maintenance status. Please try again.
errors.MAINTENANCE_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK: The change could not be saved due to an unexpected error. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_MAINTENANCE_STATUS: The selected maintenance status is not valid.
errors.INVALID_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TRANSITION: This maintenance status change is not allowed.
errors.INVALID_SCHEDULED_DATE: Please enter a valid scheduled date.
errors.NOTIFICATION_CREATE_FAILED: The action succeeded, but a notification could not be sent.
errors.SMTP_AUTH_FAILED: Email server authentication failed. Please check your SMTP credentials.
errors.SMTP_NOT_CONFIGURED: Email sending is not configured yet.
errors.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED: The email could not be sent. Please try again.
errors.PDF_GENERATION_FAILED: The PDF could not be generated. Please try again.
errors.AI_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: The AI usage limit for your plan has been reached.
errors.CONFIRMATION_CODE_MISMATCH: The confirmation code does not match.
errors.ROLE_ACCESS_UPDATE_FAILED: Unable to update role permissions. Please try again.
errors.GPS_CONNECTION_FAILED: Unable to connect to the GPS provider. Please check your credentials.
errors.SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: This feature requires an active subscription.
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Backend server is not running on port 8082.
errors.ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Your agency account is suspended. Please contact Innovax Technologies or update your subscription.
errors.FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE: This feature is not included in your subscription plan.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Server error. Please check backend logs.
errors.REQUEST_FAILED: We could not complete this request. Please try again.
